rulings.Case Title: MATEEL ENVIRONMENTAL JUSTICE FOUNDATION VS. BELL AUTOMOTIVE PRODUCTS INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Smart Innovations Inc.'S Motion To Set Aside Default
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JULY 11, 2007, LINE 15. DEFENDANT SMART INNOVATIONS, INC.'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS DENIED FOR INVALID PROOF OF SERVICE. "I CAUSED" DOES NOT SHOW PERSONAL KNOWLEDGE OF MAILING. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EX REL. ALES CERNY et al VS. LUXON CABS, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JULY 11, 2007, LINE 6. DEFENDANT HASSARD BONNINGTON, L.L.P., PHILIP WARD AND JOANNA STOREY'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT IS PROTECTED BY THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE AND PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PRESENT ANY EVIDENCE THAT PLAINTIFF CAN PREVAIL ON EITHER THE FIFTH AND SEVENTH CAUSES OF ACTIONS. =(302/PJM/AP)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD PAZ VS. JAMES TELLEZ et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY*****
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JULY 11, 2007, LINE 7. DEFENDANT JAMES TELLEZ'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES A COMMUNITY PROPERTY INTEREST, MEANING THAT THE PROBATE COURTS DOES NOT HAVE EXCLUSIVE JURISDICTION. PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARE PROPERLY ALLEGED. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: EDWARD PAZ VS. JAMES TELLEZ et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY*****
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JULY 11, 2007, LINE 7. DEFENDANT PATRICIA SMITH'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. PARAGRAPHS 9, 25, 33 AND 34 PLEAD THAT SMITH WRONGFULLY DETAINED THE PROPERTY. PLAINTIFF ALLEGES A COMMUNITY PROPERTY INTEREST, MEANING THAT THE PROBATE COURTS DOES NOT HAVE EXCLUSIVE JURISDICTION. PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARE PROPERLY ALLEGED. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: CYNTHIA LEA CLARK-MARKOWITZ VS. PENNY SUE MARKOWITZ
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JULY 11, 2007, LINE 8. DEFENDANT PENNY MARKOWITZ'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS THE BURDEN OF PROOF TO DEMONSTRATE BY COMPETENT EVIDENCE THAT THERE IS PERSONAL JURISDICTION OVER DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO PROVIDE SUCH EVIDENCE. =(302/PJM/CB-X)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: CALIFORNIA CORRECTIONAL PEACE OFFICERS'*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY*****
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion To Transfer Venue And Request For Costs And Atty'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JULY 11, 2007, LINE 12. RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF CORRECTIONS' Amended Notice Of Motion To Transfer Venue And Request For Costs And ATTORNEY'S Fees IS GRANTED GIVEN THE RULE ON EXCLUSIVE CONCURRENT JURISDICTION. C.C.P. SECTION 1292.4 AND PEOPLE EX REL. GARAMENDI V AM. AUTOPLAN (1993) 20 CAL. APP. 4TH 760, 769-70. COLLATERAL ESTOPPEL IS NOT APPLICABLE. =(302/PJM/DS-X)

rulings.Case Title: DIANE TRUONG VS. ADOLFO SANCHEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JULY 11, 2007, LINE 13. DEFENDANTS ADOLFO SANCHEZ AND LOGE SANCHEZ'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR, FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: W.D.BRITTON &CO INC VS. PRINT MASTERS INC et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON WEDNESDAY, JULY 11, 2007, LINE 14. DEFENDANT PRINT MASTERS INC. AND JANE BRIONES' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED; IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE PRIOR ORDER ON THE MOTION TO QUASH, THE ANSWER IS TO BE FILED ON JULY 12, 2007. PARAGRAPH FOUR PLEADS THE AGENT'S ULTIMATE AUTHORITY AND WRITTEN AUTHORITY IS NOT A MANDATORY REQUIREMENT. IT WAS APPROPRIATE TO NAME BRIONES, WHO EXECUTED THE LEASE AND LATE FEES MAY BE DEMANDED. REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. C.C.P. SECTION 128.7 IS THE APPLICABLE STATUTE. =(302/PJM/PB)
